div.head:
No. 303.
Mr. Bayard to Mr. Morgan.
div.p: Mr. Bayard informs Mr. Morgan that his instruction No. 148, of March 20, 1886, was intended for communication to the Mexican Government as reciting facts which might aid it in the investigation which it had undertaken as to the killing of Captain Crawford at Teopar, and as showing the necessity of punishing those who were guilty of his death and of rendering such occurrences impossible hereafter.
